summary: Phase 1 transition from mock to live data successfully implemented and tested. FRED and MarketAux integrations working with live data. 7 badges implemented in MacroContext including Brent Crude and Gold. Pre-simulation sentiment endpoint combining GDELT + MarketAux operational.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 6 fields instead of expected 14 FRED fields
minor_bugs.impact: Reduced data richness but core functionality works

minor_bugs.issue: 1-hour caching not consistently working between requests
minor_bugs.impact: May hit rate limits more frequently

working_endpoints.status: Comprehensive health check working - shows FRED: OK, MarketAux: OK, yfinance: OK, AISStream: PENDING_KEY, GDELT: RATE_LIMITED, 3/6 live sources, demo_ready: true
Returns 7 badges including live Brent Crude ($94.35/bbl) and Gold ($2650.00/oz) from FRED
Successfully combines GDELT + MarketAux sentiment with combined_bias: 0.29, strength: STRONG

minor_performance.issue: Takes time to load initially, shows 'Loading macro indicators...'
Events take time to load, shows 'Loading events...'
minor_performance.impact: Pre-simulation testing delayed by API response time

minor_performance.issue: GDP showing very large number (607475000000.0%) - formatting issue
minor_performance.impact: Data display issue but not functional

working_features.status: ✅ 7 badges working: FED FUNDS, AUD/USD, BRENT CRUDE ($94.35/bbl - LIVE), GOLD ($2650.00/oz - LIVE), IRON ORE, RBA CASH, ASX 200, plus CPI badge from Australian macro
✅ Component renders and attempts to load events from API
✅ App loads successfully at https://mirror-fish.preview.emergentagent.com with all expected UI components

passed_tests: Health Check - FRED integration (OK with 5 fields)
Health Check - AISStream graceful handling (PENDING_KEY as expected)
Health Check - GDELT integration (RATE_LIMITED but functional)
Pre-Simulation - MarketAux signal working (1 article, bias 0.483)
Pre-Simulation - Combined sentiment calculation (0.29 bias, STRONG)
AISStream - Helpful error message for missing key
Australian Macro - FRED data source integration
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes: 1) Fix GDP number formatting in Australian macro display, 2) Consider adding more FRED fields to reach the 14-field target, 3) Optimize GDELT caching mechanism. Overall Phase 1 transition successful - live data integrations working.
